title: Social & Companions Demo
blurb: influence_npc persuasion, an immovable foe, recruit_npc, and an ally fighting at the party's side.

parley_ledge.location: A torchlit ledge above the warren
parley_ledge.scene: A lone goblin, Snik, blocks the rope-bridge down into the warren, blade half-raised but eyes wary — this one looks like he would rather talk than die for whoever pays him. Below, the tunnels echo with other voices.

warren.scene: A low, reeking burrow of packed earth. A mindless skeleton sentry, Rattle, stands bolt upright in an alcove, jaw clacking — there is no reasoning with that. Beside a cookfire, a second goblin, Grub, leaps up with a shriek and grabs for his cleaver. This is the bottom of the warren; there is nowhere deeper to go.
